languages.text: "Бросьте, лорд Себериан, вы этим клинком даже меня не одолеете!

traits.locale_text: "Бросьте, Себериан, вы этим клинком даже меня не одолеете!

languages.text: "Come now, Lord Seberian, you can't even defeat me with that blade!
languages.original_text: "Бросьте, лорд Себериан, вы этим клинком даже меня не одолеете!

traits.locale_text: "Come now, Lord Seberian, you can't even defeat me with that blade!
"Come now, Lord Seberian, you can't even defeat me with that blade!
"Come now, Lord Seberian, you can't even defeat me with that blade!

languages.text: “算了吧，塞贝里安大人。用那把剑，你连我都应付不了！”
languages.original_text: "Come now, Lord Seberian, you can't even defeat me with that blade!

traits.locale_text: “算了吧，塞贝里安大人。用那把剑，你连我都应付不了！”

languages.text: « Allons, seigneur Seberian, vous ne pourriez même pas me vaincre moi avec cette épée ! »
languages.original_text: "Come now, Lord Seberian, you can't even defeat me with that blade!

traits.locale_text: « Allons, seigneur Seberian, vous ne pourriez même pas me vaincre moi avec cette épée ! »

languages.text: «Vamos, lord Seberian, ¡con esa espada no me derrotaría ni a mí!».
languages.original_text: "Come now, Lord Seberian, you can't even defeat me with that blade!

traits.locale_text: «Vamos, lord Seberian, ¡con esa espada no me derrotaría ni a mí!».

languages.text: "Yapma Lord Seberian... O kılıçla beni bile yenemezsin!"
languages.original_text: "Come now, Lord Seberian, you can't even defeat me with that blade!

traits.locale_text: "Yapma Lord Seberian... O kılıçla beni bile yenemezsin!"

languages.text: "Kommt schon, Lord Seberian, Ihr könnt mit dieser Klinge nicht einmal mich besiegen!"
languages.original_text: "Come now, Lord Seberian, you can't even defeat me with that blade!

traits.locale_text: "Kommt schon, Lord Seberian, Ihr könnt mit dieser Klinge nicht einmal mich besiegen!"

languages.text: 「さあ、セベリアンの殿、その刀では私を倒せませんよ！」
languages.original_text: "Come now, Lord Seberian, you can't even defeat me with that blade!

traits.locale_text: 「さあ、セベリアンの殿、その刀では私を倒せませんよ！」
